case_title: LARRY BRODKIN et al VS. HUMPHREY CHEN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRODKIN, LARRY WALTON, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEN, HUMPHREY DBA  CHEN'S PLUMBING CHEN'S PLUMBING, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BRODKIN, LARRY WALTON, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, HUMPHREY DBA  CHEN'S PLUMBING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRODKIN, LARRY WALTON, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, HUMPHREY DBA  CHEN'S PLUMBING
DECLARATION REQUESTING TO RESET JUN-30-2011 COURT DATE TO ALLOW FOR TIME TO SERVE AMENDED COURT DATE; CLAIM AMENDED TO CHANGE DEFENDANTS NAME; FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRODKIN, LARRY WALTON, DAVID
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-14-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$WAIVED) SERVED JUN-16-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN'S PLUMBING, INC.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BRODKIN, LARRY WALTON, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN'S PLUMBING, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-14-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2011 - JUDGMENT.
